# AI Powered Interview Coach

An interactive chatbot application for interview preparation with voice and text support.

## Project Overview

- **Type**: React TypeScript Web Application
- **Framework**: React + Vite
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Specialization**: Power Platform + Copilot Studio Developer Interviews
- **Features**: 
  - Voice input (Speech-to-Text) and output (Text-to-Speech)
  - Text-based chat interface with message history
  - Structured interview mode with 8 professional questions
  - Example answers and detailed feedback
  - Responsive design for all devices

## Setup Progress

- [x] Project scaffolding initialized
- [x] Dependencies installed
- [x] Development server running
- [x] Application compiled
- [x] Interview mode implemented
- [x] Question database created
- [x] Feedback system added
